  "body": "Helm v3.16.3 is a patch release. Users are encouraged to upgrade for the best experience. Users are encouraged to upgrade for the best experience.\r\n\r\nThe community keeps growing, and we'd love to see you there!\r\n\r\n- Join the discussion in [Kubernetes Slack](https://kubernetes.slack.com):\r\n  -  for questions and just to hang out\r\n  -  for discussing PRs, code, and bugs\r\n- Hang out at the Public Developer Call: Thursday, 9:30 Pacific via [Zoom](https://zoom.us/j/696660622)\r\n- Test, debug, and contribute charts: [ArtifactHub/packages](https://artifacthub.io/packages/search?kind=0)\r\n\r\n## Installation and Upgrading\r\n\r\nDownload Helm v3.16.3. The common platform binaries are here:\r\n\r\n- [MacOS amd64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-darwin-amd64.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-darwin-amd64.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 495d75b404a96fb664f1ca3f8cb01db2210aacc62dbfa1bbab30916abbb20a57)\r\n- [MacOS arm64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-darwin-arm64.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-darwin-arm64.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 3a39f690173086e6eea17674751eb3c8b970c02697e49cecd4093eaa3cf89dcd)\r\n- [Linux amd64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-amd64.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-amd64.tar.gz.sha256sum) / f5355c79190951eed23c5432a3b920e071f4c00a64f75e077de0dd4cb7b294ea)\r\n- [Linux arm](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-arm.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-arm.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 02ba2f3b1524113f49be6df25a0b4b3190010d6e218c8e2b2fde4578a8439a9c)\r\n- [Linux arm64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-arm64.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-arm64.tar.gz.sha256sum) / ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-386.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 70318f60fec3219680fff86c9293e2a92fb8b9a691d41791661074588f22768e)\r\n- [Linux ppc64le](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-ppc64le.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-ppc64le.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 266f7698c56a724fddd3a2f2b862ad496c4338dce79f0282fdbc6e23e1738608)\r\n- [Linux s390x](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-s390x.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-s390x.tar.gz.sha256sum) / bac414c409faead9c2b8af11d29281aa4f1aeb9139c62d5178baf982d71fc9bb)\r\n- [Linux riscv64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-riscv64.tar.gz) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-linux-riscv64.tar.gz.sha256sum) / 492843d2584bb14bd38a735a9708af2d7f3ea7e1b6c43e650968f16fce0b5064)\r\n- [Windows amd64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-windows-amd64.zip) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-windows-amd64.zip.sha256sum) / 1a52aa56e55168c3d3d2e45fa833a32290e4e3790559851dce1e707eb7728b81)\r\n- [Windows arm64](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-windows-arm64.zip) ([checksum](https://get.helm.sh/helm-v3.16.3-windows-arm64.zip.sha256sum) / 247a63269a83bb73c14e8f62b0cfd5a2e1d32b7d3f93977d3a6ef3902d218ff1)\r\n\r\nThis release was signed with `672C 657B E06B 4B30 969C 4A57 4614 49C2 5E36 B98E ` and can be found at @mattfarina [keybase account](https://keybase.io/mattfarina). Please use the attached signatures for verifying this release using `gpg`.\r\n\r\nThe [Quickstart Guide](https://helm.sh/brain/knowledge/docs_legacy/intro/quickstart/) will get you going from there. For **upgrade instructions** or detailed installation notes, check the [install guide](https://helm.sh/brain/knowledge/docs_legacy/intro/install/). You can also use a [script to install](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3) on any system with `bash`.\r\n\r\n## What's Next\r\n\r\n- 3.16.4 is the next patch release and will be on December 11, 2024\r\n- 3.17.0 is the next feature release and will be on January 15, 2025\r\n\r\n## Changelog\r\n\r\n- fix: fix label name cfd07493f46efc9debd9cc1b02a0961186df7fdf (wangjingcun)\r\n- Fix typo in pkg/lint/rules/chartfile_test.go a303060fc60bc713cd0757503b3fcb4636b14f34 (Zach Burgess)\r\n- Increasing the size of the runner used for releases. ab45e8a861e929e40163a7ad5a8636cb41f381ac (Matt Farina)\r\n- fix(hooks): correct hooks delete order 19fe320ae87e8d1d4bc1952d9da8ea2fe435aa6e (Suleiman Dibirov)\r\n- Bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.7.12 to 1.7.23 4fcc5c2cadf49d1399adfdbc5ab7222b2dff1d5b (dependabot[bot])",

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/helmfile/helmfile/tarball/v1.1.7",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/helmfile/helmfile/zipball/v1.1.7",
  "body": "## What's Changed\r\n* fix pflag error by @zhaque44 in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2164\r\n* build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2166\r\n* build(deps): bump github.com/hashicorp/go-getter from 1.7.9 to 1.7.10 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2165\r\n* build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/pflag from 1.0.9 to 1.0.10 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2163\r\n* Add helm diff installation to README by @nwneisen in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2170\r\n* build(deps): bump github.com/hashicorp/go-getter from 1.7.10 to 1.8.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2175\r\n* build(deps): bump golang.org/x/term from 0.34.0 to 0.35.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2174\r\n* build(deps): bump github.com/zclconf/go-cty from 1.16.4 to 1.17.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2173\r\n* Fix panic when helm isn't installed by @nwneisen in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2169\r\n* build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sync from 0.16.0 to 0.17.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2172\r\n* ci: update minikube and kubernetes versions by @yxxhero in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2181\r\n* build(deps): bump k8s.io/apimachinery from 0.34.0 to 0.34.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2180\r\n* Remove deprecated --wait-retries flag support to fix Helm compatibility error by @Copilot in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2179\r\n* build(deps): bump go.yaml.in/yaml/v2 from 2.4.2 to 2.4.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2183\r\n* build: update Helm to v3.19.0 across all components by @yxxhero in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2187\r\n* build: update helm-diff plugin to v3.13.0 by @yxxhero in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2189\r\n* feat: Implement caching for pulling OCI charts by @mustdiechik in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2171\r\n* build(deps): bump github.com/helmfile/chartify from 0.24.7 to 0.25.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2190\r\n\r\n## New Contributors\r\n* @nwneisen made their first contribution in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2170\r\n* @mustdiechik made their first contribution in https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/pull/2171\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile/compare/v1.1.6...v1.1.7",
  "mentions_count": 5
}
```

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sourcemeta/jsonschema/tarball/v11.8.1",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/sourcemeta/jsonschema/zipball/v11.8.1",
  "body": "## What's Changed\r\n* More clearly document why we don't support `format` as an assertion by @jviotti in https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/pull/474\r\n* Fix `fmt` incorrectly updating the file modified time even when not needed by @jviotti in https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/pull/469\r\n* Support `-v` as a top-level command to print the version of the CLI by @Karan-Palan in https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/pull/471\r\n* Fix `--loop` sometimes yielding a negative average by @jviotti in https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/pull/475\r\n* Fix `validate --template` crashing with `patternProperties` by @jviotti in https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/pull/477\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sourcemeta/jsonschema/compare/v11.8.0...v11.8.1",
  "mentions_count": 2
}
```

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/derailed/k9s/tarball/v0.32.7",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/derailed/k9s/zipball/v0.32.7",
  "body": "<img src=\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derailed/k9s/master/assets/k9s.png\" align=\"center\" width=\"800\" height=\"auto\"/>\n\n# Release v0.32.7\n\n## Notes\n\nThank you to all that contributed with flushing out issues and enhancements for K9s!\nI'll try to mark some of these issues as fixed. But if you don't mind grab the latest rev\nand see if we're happier with some of the fixes!\nIf you've filed an issue please help me verify and close.\n\nYour support, kindness and awesome suggestions to make K9s better are, as ever, very much noted and appreciated!\nAlso big thanks to all that have allocated their own time to help others on both slack and on this repo!!\n\nAs you may know, K9s is not pimped out by corps with deep pockets, thus if you feel K9s is helping your Kubernetes journey,\nplease consider joining our [sponsorship program](https://github.com/sponsors/derailed) and/or make some noise on social! [@kitesurfer](https://twitter.com/kitesurfer)\n\nOn Slack? Please join us [K9slackers](https://join.slack.com/t/k9sers/shared_invite/enQtOTA5MDEyNzI5MTU0LWQ1ZGI3MzliYzZhZWEyNzYxYzA3NjE0YTk1YmFmNzViZjIyNzhkZGI0MmJjYzhlNjdlMGJhYzE2ZGU1NjkyNTM)\n\n## Maintenance Release!\n\n---\n\n## Videos Are In The Can!\n\nPlease dial [K9s Channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC897uwPygni4QIjkPCpgjmw) for up coming content...\n\n* [K9s v0.31.0 Configs+Sneak peek](https://youtu.be/X3444KfjguE)\n* [K9s v0.30.0 Sneak peek](https://youtu.be/mVBc1XneRJ4)\n* [Vulnerability Scans](https://youtu.be/ULkl0MsaidU)\n\n---\n\n## Resolved Issues\n\n* [#2970](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2970) Ctrl-z on events view causes runtime error in v0.32.6\n* [#2969](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2969) When using impersonation user information and permissions not preserved when switching context\n* [#2966](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2966) Go to the Contexts page and filter, contexts that are matched will be filtered ou\n* [#2962](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2962) Small colour/filtering related bug\n* [#2961](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2961) Drain node with the -disable-eviction\n* [#2958](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2958) Restart count in container view associated with the wrong container\n* [#2945](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/issues/2945) Could we add ServiceAccount Column in v1/POD view\n\n---\n\n## Contributed PRs\n\nPlease be sure to give `Big Thanks!` and `ATTA Girls/Boys!` to all the fine contributors for making K9s better for all of us!!\n\n* [#2968](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/pull/2968) Update go version to 1.23.X in README\n* [#2964](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/pull/2964) feat(dao,used-by-cmd): check imagePullSecrets as well\n* [#2960](https://github.com/derailed/k9s/pull/2960) Put log levels in order in cmd help\n\n---\n\n<img src=\"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/derailed/k9s/master/assets/imhotep_logo.png\" width=\"32\" height=\"auto\"/> © 2024 Imhotep Software LLC. All materials licensed under [Apache v2.0](http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)\n",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/derailed/k9s/releases/185773422/reactions",
    "total_count": 18,

    "-1": 0,
    "laugh": 0,
    "hooray": 3,
    "confused": 0,
    "heart": 0,
    "rocket": 3,
    "eyes": 0
  }
}

      "download_count": 1516,
      "created_at": "2025-08-27T17:42:59Z",
      "updated_at": "2025-08-27T17:43:00Z",

  ],
  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kubernetes-sigs/kind/tarball/v0.30.0",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kubernetes-sigs/kind/zipball/v0.30.0",
  "body": "This is small release containing patched dependencies and Kubernetes 1.34, as well as a bugfix for Kubernetes v1.33.0+ cluster reboots.\r\n\r\n<h1 id=\"breaking-changes\">Breaking Changes</h1>\r\n\r\nThe default node image is now `kindest/node:v1.34.0@sha256:7416a61b42b1662ca6ca89f02028ac133a309a2a30ba309614e8ec94d976dc5a`\r\n\r\n<h1 id=\"new-features\">New Features</h1>\r\n\r\n- Updated to containerd 2.1.4\r\n\r\nImages pre-built for this release:\r\n- v1.34.0: `kindest/node:v1.34.0@sha256:7416a61b42b1662ca6ca89f02028ac133a309a2a30ba309614e8ec94d976dc5a`\r\n- v1.33.4: `kindest/node:v1.33.4@sha256:25a6018e48dfcaee478f4a59af81157a437f15e6e140bf103f85a2e7cd0cbbf2`\r\n- v1.32.8: `kindest/node:v1.32.8@sha256:abd489f042d2b644e2d033f5c2d900bc707798d075e8186cb65e3f1367a9d5a1`\r\n- v1.31.12: `kindest/node:v1.31.12@sha256:0f5cc49c5e73c0c2bb6e2df56e7df189240d83cf94edfa30946482eb08ec57d2`\r\n\r\n**NOTE**: You _must_ use the `@sha256` digest to guarantee an image built for this release, until such a time as we switch to a different tagging scheme. Even then we will highly encourage digest pinning for security and reproducibility reasons.\r\n\r\nSee also: \r\n- https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/brain/knowledge/docs_legacy/user/quick-start/#creating-a-cluster\r\n- https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/brain/knowledge/docs_legacy/user/quick-start/#building-images\r\n\r\nNOTE: These node images support amd64 and arm64, both of our supported platforms. **You must use the same platform as your host,** for more context see https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kind/issues/2718\r\n\r\n<h1 id=\"fixes\">Fixes</h1>\r\n\r\n- Fix an issue with rebooting v1.33.0+ clusters https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kind/issues/3941\r\n- Add priority class system-critical to kindnetd\r\n- Fix HA control-plane loadbalancer for podman https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kind/pull/3962\r\n- Fix node-image builds with relative source paths\r\n\r\n<h1 id=\"contributors\">Contributors</h1>\r\n\r\nCommitters for this release:\r\n- @BenTheElder\r\n- @dims\r\n- @k8s-ci-robot\r\n- @oduludo\r\n- @stmcginnis\r\n- @tchap\r\n- @tom1299 ",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kubernetes-sigs/kind/releases/242930870/reactions",
    "total_count": 8,
    "+1": 0,
    "-1": 0,

    "hooray": 0,
    "confused": 0,
    "heart": 4,
    "rocket": 4,
    "eyes": 0
  },
  "mentions_count": 7
}
```

  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/kubernetes/kops/zipball/v1.30.2",
  "body": "Release v1.30.2\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16779: versionbump: update golang to 1.22.6\r\n#16826: Update Go to v1.22.7 by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16827\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16818: Conditionally set TF aws_s3_object SSE and ACLs by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16830\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16831: Disable node-problem-detector containerd and kubelet checks by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16832\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16853: fix(cluster-autoscaler): add missing permission\r\n#16855: correct hubble tls file names as mapped from secret by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16856\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16857: Suppress request logging for IMDS within Route53 client by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16858\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16879: Ignore blackhole NAT routes\r\n#16868: aws: Update VPC CNI to v1.18.5 by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16881\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16883: Update containerd to v1.7.22 by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16884\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16887: Fix awsup default and DescribeTag max retries by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16891\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16909: Use a different healthcheck port for AWS CSI controller by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16910\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16560: Bump nvidia-driver-535-server by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16926\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16915: dns: Update coredns to v1.11.3 by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16927\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16918: API Server: memory management related flags by @hakman in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16928\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16949: chore(upup): bump aws-cni to 1.18.6 by @moshevayner in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16950\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16948: openstack: add external dns support by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16957\r\n* Automated cherry pick of #16765: Allocate more resources to cloudbuild by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16959\r\n* Release 1.30.2 by @rifelpet in https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/pull/16960\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/kubernetes/kops/compare/v1.30.1...v1.30.2",

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazydocker/tarball/v0.24.1",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazydocker/zipball/v0.24.1",
  "body": "Thanks to everybody who contributed in this release!\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* fix: Properly support remote docker daemon over ssh by @rajiv-k in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/511\r\n* fix lazydocker breaking when having default context in config by @peauc in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/552\r\n* Bump lots of dependencies for various improvements by @thaJeztah in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/561\r\n  - This fixed a bug I had where sometimes lazydocker didn't realise it was in a folder with a docker compose file.\r\n* Add hint to what .DockerCompose is in documentation by @hauskens in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/554\r\n* Use 'docker compose' by default by @jesseduffield in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/563\r\n* go.mod: github.com/docker/docker, docker/cli v27.1.1 by @thaJeztah in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/568\r\n\r\n## New Contributors\r\n* @github-actions made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/536\r\n* @peauc made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/552\r\n* @thaJeztah made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/561\r\n* @hauskens made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/pull/554\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazydocker/compare/v0.23.3...v0.24.1",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazydocker/releases/187098984/reactions",

    "rocket": 8,

  },

}

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazygit/tarball/v0.55.0",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/jesseduffield/lazygit/zipball/v0.55.0",
  "body": "<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.55.0 -->\n\n## What's Changed\n### Enhancements 🔥\n* Allow filtering the keybindings menu by keybinding by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4821\n* Add support for suspending LazyGit with Ctrl+Z on Unix systems by @cowboy8625 in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4757\n* Add \"CopyToClipboard\" command to `ConfirmationController` by @kyu08 in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4810\n* Add a user config for using git's external diff command for paging by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4832\n* Log the hash of dropped stashes by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4850\n### Fixes 🔧\n* Fix right-alignment of divergence from base branch for branch checked out in a worktree by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4824\n* Support Azure DevOps vs-ssh.visualstudio.com SSH remotes as hosting provider by @Kahitar in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4822\n* Improve display of \"esc\" keybinding in the keybindings status bar by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4819\n* Use external diff command in stashes panel by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4836\n* Remove the git.paging.useConfig option by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4837\n* Don't auto-forward branches that are checked out in another worktree by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4833\n* Fix dropping range selection of filtered stashes by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4849\n* Fix rare crash in interactive rebase (merge command without comment) by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4872\n* Make it possible to rebind the Confirm keybinding by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4860\n### Maintenance ⚙️\n* Pass only Git-tracked Go files to gofumpt by @kyu08 in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4809\n* Update donation wording so that it's clear there's no strings attached by @jesseduffield in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4827\n* Enhance PR/Issue templates readability by @kyu08 in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4829\n* Run label check workflow only on label events and open pr event by @kyu08 in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4830\n### Docs 📖\n* Add installation with gah by @marverix in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4820\n* docs(VISION): fix \"Dicoverability\" typo by @Rudxain in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4866\n* Add dev container feature as installation method to README by @HenningLorenzen-ext-bayer in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4876\n### I18n 🌎\n* Update translations from Crowdin by @stefanhaller in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4873\n\n## New Contributors\n* @marverix made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4820\n* @Kahitar made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4822\n* @cowboy8625 made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4757\n* @Rudxain made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4866\n* @HenningLorenzen-ext-bayer made their first contribution in https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/pull/4876\n\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jesseduffield/lazygit/compare/v0.54.2...v0.55.0\n\n",
  "reactions": {

}

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/odin-lang/Odin/tarball/dev-2025-09",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/odin-lang/Odin/zipball/dev-2025-09",
  "body": "## New Language Features\r\n\r\n* Native support for UTF-16 strings: `string16` and `cstring16`\r\n  * Mostly for interfacing with Windows code, and other foreign code\r\n* Define Integer Division By Zero  https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/pull/5556\r\n\r\n## New Compiler Improvements\r\n\r\n* `@(init)`  and `@(fini)` must be `proc \"contextless\" ()`\r\n* Implement `intrinsics.objc_block` @harold-b in https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/pull/5547\r\n  *  Implements the Apple block ABI.2010.3.16 natively\r\n* Improve deference missing suggestion message\r\n* Do not check for explicit allocators when determining proc in proc group by @janga-perlind in https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/pull/5564\r\n* Skip errors on polymorphic procs when in a proc group with other options \r\n* Fix compiler segfault when trying to use proc at type level or trying to use `()` as a type\r\n\r\n## New Packages\r\n\r\n*\r\n\r\n## Package Improvements\r\n\r\n* Fixes to `vendor:darwin/Metal`\r\n* Numerous minor fixes to `base:runtime`\r\n* Improvements to `base:runtime` brain\knowledge\docs_legacy\r\n* Fixes to `vendor:wasm/WebGL` bindings\r\n* Cleanup in `math/rand` and `runtime/random_generator`\r\n* Add missing xlib functions for getting and setting text properties\r\n* `vendor:OpenGL` fix misnamed parameter by \r\n* Make D3D12_FEATURE_DATA_D3D12_OPTIONS.MinPrecisionSupport a bitset \r\n* Fix buddy allocator assert \r\n* Check for EOF when scanning file tags\r\n* Fix stride in `memory_equal/compare_zero` giving false positves\r\n* Split SDL_ttf bindings to group with and without require_results\r\n* Propogate `#caller_location` to core:container/queue procs\r\n* Support using allocator resize in `_reserve_soa` \r\n* Zero existing memory when using `resize_soa`\r\n* Add `add/remove_document_event_listener()` to `core:sys/wasm/js` \r\n* Fixed and added obj-c methods for `NSWindow`\r\n* fix typo in `CLSIDFromProgIDEx` signature \r\n* Fix broken `wglUseFontBitmaps` binding \r\n* Add `LPFN_GETACCEPTEXSOCKADDRS` to ws2_32.odin\r\n* Specify `%m` and `%M `as verbs for integer formatting in `core:fmt`\r\n* Add `@(require_results)` attribute to procs returning an allocator \r\n* Handle allocator error when appending in `read_entire_file_from_file`\r\n* `vendor:box2d` fix `CreateMotorJoint` procedure signature \r\n* Add build tags to `posix/spawn.odin`\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/compare/dev-2025-08...dev-2025-09",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/odin-lang/Odin/releases/245503503/reactions",
    "total_count": 61,
    "+1": 5,
    "-1": 0,
    "laugh": 1,
    "hooray": 37,
    "confused": 0,
    "heart": 15,
    "rocket": 2,
    "eyes": 1
  },
  "mentions_count": 2
}
```

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/getsops/sops/tarball/v3.10.2",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/getsops/sops/zipball/v3.10.2",
  "body": "## Installation\n\nTo install `sops`, download one of the pre-built binaries provided for your platform from the artifacts attached to this release.\n\nFor instance, if you are using Linux on an AMD64 architecture:\n\n```shell\n# Download the binary\ncurl -LO https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/download/v3.10.2/sops-v3.10.2.linux.amd64\n\n# Move the binary in to your PATH\nmv sops-v3.10.2.linux.amd64 /usr/local/bin/sops\n\n# Make the binary executable\nchmod +x /usr/local/bin/sops\n```\n\n### Verify checksums file signature\n\nThe checksums file provided within the artifacts attached to this release is signed using [Cosign](https://docs.sigstore.dev/cosign/overview/) with GitHub OIDC. To validate the signature of this file, run the following commands:\n\n```shell\n# Download the checksums file, certificate and signature\ncurl -LO https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/download/v3.10.2/sops-v3.10.2.checksums.txt\ncurl -LO https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/download/v3.10.2/sops-v3.10.2.checksums.pem\ncurl -LO https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/download/v3.10.2/sops-v3.10.2.checksums.sig\n\n# Verify the checksums file\ncosign verify-blob sops-v3.10.2.checksums.txt \\\n  --certificate sops-v3.10.2.checksums.pem \\\n  --signature sops-v3.10.2.checksums.sig \\\n  --certificate-identity-regexp=https://github.com/getsops \\\n  --certificate-oidc-issuer=https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com\n```\n\n### Verify binary integrity\n\nTo verify the integrity of the downloaded binary, you can utilize the checksums file after having validated its signature:\n\n```shell\n# Verify the binary using the checksums file\nsha256sum -c sops-v3.10.2.checksums.txt --ignore-missing\n```\n\n### Verify artifact provenance\n\nThe [SLSA provenance](https://slsa.dev/provenance/v0.2) of the binaries, packages, and SBOMs can be found within the artifacts associated with this release. It is presented through an [in-toto](https://in-toto.io/) link metadata file named `sops-v3.10.2.intoto.jsonl`. To verify the provenance of an artifact, you can utilize the [`slsa-verifier`](https://github.com/slsa-framework/slsa-verifier#artifacts) tool:\n\n```shell\n# Download the metadata file\ncurl -LO  https://github.com/getsops/sops/releases/download/v3.10.2/sops-v3.10.2.intoto.jsonl\n\n# Verify the provenance of the artifact\nslsa-verifier verify-artifact <artifact> \\\n  --provenance-path sops-v3.10.2.intoto.jsonl \\\n  --source-uri github.com/getsops/sops \\\n  --source-tag v3.10.2\n```\n\n## Container Images\n\nThe `sops` binaries are also available as container images, based on Debian (slim) and Alpine Linux. The Debian-based container images include any dependencies which may be required to make use of certain key services, such as GnuPG, AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, and Google Cloud KMS. The Alpine-based container images are smaller in size, but do not include these dependencies.\n\nThese container images are available for the following architectures: `linux/amd64` and `linux/arm64`.\n\n### GitHub Container Registry\n\n- `ghcr.io/getsops/sops:v3.10.2`\n- `ghcr.io/getsops/sops:v3.10.2-alpine`\n\n### Quay.io\n\n- `quay.io/getsops/sops:v3.10.2`\n- `quay.io/getsops/sops:v3.10.2-alpine`\n\n### Verify container image signature\n\nThe container images are signed using [Cosign](https://docs.sigstore.dev/cosign/overview/) with GitHub OIDC. To validate the signature of an image, run the following command:\n\n```shell\ncosign verify ghcr.io/getsops/sops:v3.10.2 \\\n  --certificate-identity-regexp=https://github.com/getsops \\\n  --certificate-oidc-issuer=https://token.actions.githubusercontent.com \\\n  -o text\n```\n\n### Verify container image provenance\n\nThe container images include [SLSA provenance](https://slsa.dev/provenance/v0.2) attestations. For more information around the verification of this, please refer to the [`slsa-verifier` documentation](https://github.com/slsa-framework/slsa-verifier#containers).\n\n## Software Bill of Materials\n\nThe Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for each binary is accessible within the artifacts enclosed with this release. It is presented as an [SPDX](https://spdx.dev/) JSON file, formatted as `<binary>.spdx.sbom.json`.\n\n## What's Changed\n* build(deps): Bump the go group with 13 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1834\n* Use latest 1.24 Go version for release build by @hiddeco in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1836\n* Remove reserved keyword check from YAML store's `LoadPlainFile()` by @felixfontein in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1829\n* build(deps): Bump the go group with 9 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1839\n* build(deps): Bump github/codeql-action from 3.28.13 to 3.28.15 in the ci group by @dependabot in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1840\n* Release 3.10.2 release by @felixfontein in https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1841\n\n\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/getsops/sops/compare/v3.10.1...v3.10.2\n\n",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/getsops/sops/releases/212299385/reactions",
    "total_count": 1,
    "+1": 1,
    "-1": 0,
    "laugh": 0,
    "hooray": 0,
    "confused": 0,
    "heart": 0,
    "rocket": 0,
    "eyes": 0
  },
  "mentions_count": 3
}
```

  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gruntwork-io/terragrunt/zipball/v0.69.3",
  "body": "## What's Changed\r\n* Fixing an issue when `error_hook` processing only takes `stderr` into account and ignores `stdout` TF output.\r\n* Displaying stack trace only at log level `trace`, e.g. `--terragrunt-log-level trace`.\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt/compare/v0.69.2...v0.69.3"
}

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/opentofu/opentofu/tarball/v1.8.6",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/opentofu/opentofu/zipball/v1.8.6",
  "body": "ENHANCEMENTS:\r\n* OpenTofu builds now use Go version 1.22 ([#2050](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/2050))\r\n\r\nBUG FIXES:\r\n* Extended trace logging for HTTP backend, including request and response bodies. ([#2120](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/2120))\r\n* The `tofu test` command doesn't try to validate mock provider definition by its underlying provider schema now. ([#2140](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/2140))\r\n* Type validation for mocks and overrides are now less strict in `tofu test`. ([#2144](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/2144))",
  "reactions": {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/opentofu/opentofu/releases/186971169/reactions",

  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/zipball/v3.84.2",
  "body": "## What's Changed\r\n* fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.10.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3659\r\n* Fix multiple package error in tests by @rgmz in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3661\r\n* [scan-9] Update enumeration logic by @0x1 in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3626\r\n* Add Scan method to SourceManager to scan a single SourceUnit by @mcastorina in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3650\r\n* fix(deps): update module github.com/couchbase/gocb/v2 to v2.9.3 by @renovate in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3682\r\n* chore(deps): update jaxxstorm/action-install-gh-release action to v1.14.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3672\r\n* [feat] - S3 metrics by @ahrav in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3577\r\n* fixed api flash detector by @kashifkhan0771 in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3666\r\n* Added pattern unit tests for detectors starting with the letters n through o by @nabeelalam in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3685\r\n* fix(deps): update module github.com/jedib0t/go-pretty/v6 to v6.6.3 by @renovate in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3690\r\n* Updated/fixed the function names of pattern tests for detectors n through o by @nabeelalam in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3691\r\n* fix(deps): update module github.com/wasilibs/go-re2 to v1.8.0 by @renovate in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3695\r\n* Added pattern unit tests for detectors starting with the letters p through q by @nabeelalam in https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/pull/3710\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog/compare/v3.84.1...v3.84.2",
  "mentions_count": 7
}
```

  "body": "This is a maintenance release, focusing on bug fixes.\r\n\r\n## What's Changed\r\n* fix: expose `ui.Wrap` by @sxyazi in https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/pull/2810\r\n* fix: `forward --end-of-word` of the input should consider the mode's delta by @sxyazi in https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/pull/2811\r\n* fix: make every effort to carry hidden states for dummy files by @sxyazi in https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/pull/2814\r\n\r\n\r\n**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/compare/v25.5.28...v25.5.31",

  "tarball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/tarball/v0.9.8",
  "zipball_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/zipball/v0.9.8",
  "body": "### Added\r\n\r\n- Support for Tcsh.\r\n- Added `--score` flag to `zoxide add`.\r\n- POSIX: add doctor to diagnose common issues.\r\n- Nushell: add CLI completions.\r\n\r\n### Changed\r\n\r\n- Bash: zoxide will now automatically `cd` when selecting Space-Tab completions.\r\n\r\n### Fixed\r\n\r\n- Bash: doctor now handles `PROMPT_COMMAND` being an array.\r\n- Bash: doctor now handles Visual Studio Code's shell integration.\r\n- Bash: completions now work with `ble.sh`.\r\n- Nushell: stop ignoring symlinks when `cd`-ing into a directory.\r\n- Fzf: updated minimum supported version to v0.51.0.\r\n- PowerShell: avoid setting `$error` when defining `__zoxide_hooked`.\r\n- PowerShell: handle special characters in file paths when `cd`-ing into them.\r\n- Database corruption issue when the filesystem is 100% full.",
  "reactions": {

## File: `tools/install.sh`
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash

# gah! installer
#
# @author Marek `marverix` Sierociński
# @license GNU GPLv3

# Pipeline mode
set -e

# Configuration
if [[ -z "$GAH_INSTALL_DIR" ]]; then
	if [[ $EUID -ne 0 ]]; then
		GAH_INSTALL_DIR="$HOME/.local/bin"
	else
		GAH_INSTALL_DIR="/usr/local/bin"
	fi
fi

#--------------------------------------------------
#region Utils
function print_blue() {
	echo -e "\033[0;34m$1\033[0m"
}

function print_green() {
	echo -e "\033[0;32m$1\033[0m"
}

function print_yellow() {
	echo -e "\033[0;33m$1\033[0m"
}

function throw_error() {
	echo -e "\033[0;31mError: $2\033[0m" >&2
	exit $1
}

function require_command() {
	local cmd=$1
	local cmd_alternative=$2
	if [[ -z $cmd_alternative ]]; then
		print_blue "Checking if $cmd is installed..."
	else
		print_blue "Checking if $cmd or $cmd_alternative are installed..."
	fi
	if ! command -v $cmd 2>&1 >/dev/null; then
		if [[ -z $cmd_alternative ]]; then
			throw_error 2 "$cmd is not installed"
		fi
		if ! command -v $cmd_alternative 2>&1 >/dev/null; then
			throw_error 2 "$cmd and $cmd_alternative are both not installed"
		fi
	fi
	print_green "OK"
}
#endregion
#--------------------------------------------------

# Require that bash is at least 3.0
print_blue "Checking if Bash 3.0 or higher is installed..."
if [ "${BASH_VERSINFO[0]}" -lt 3 ]; then
	throw_error 1 "Bash 3.0 or higher is required"
fi
print_green "OK"

# Check if required commands are installed
# Perl is only required for Bash 3.x (Bash 4+ has native regex support)
if [ "${BASH_VERSINFO[0]}" -lt 4 ]; then
	print_yellow "Bash 3.x detected - Perl is required for regex support"
	require_command perl
else
	print_green "Bash 4+ detected - native regex support available"
fi

require_command tar
require_command unzip
require_command curl wget
require_command jq
require_command openssl

# Ensure ~/.local/bin exists
print_blue "Ensuring $GAH_INSTALL_DIR exists..."
mkdir -p "$GAH_INSTALL_DIR"
print_green "OK"

# Check if ~/.local/bin is in PATH
print_blue "Checking if $GAH_INSTALL_DIR is in PATH..."
if [[ ":$PATH:" != *":$GAH_INSTALL_DIR:"* ]]; then
	print_yellow "WARNING: $GAH_INSTALL_DIR is not in PATH. gah will not work if $GAH_INSTALL_DIR is not in PATH."
else
	print_green "OK, looks good!"
fi

if [[ -n "${GITHUB_PAT:-}" ]]; then
	GITHUB_AUTH_ARGS=(--header "Authorization: token ${GITHUB_PAT}")
	print_green "Using GitHub Personal Access Token for API requests"
else
	GITHUB_AUTH_ARGS=()
	print_yellow "No GITHUB_PAT found - using unauthenticated GitHub API (rate limited to 60 requests/hour)"
fi

# Check gah latest tag
if [[ -z "$GAH_VERSION" ]]; then
	print_blue "Checking latest gah release..."
	if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
		tag=$(curl -s "${GITHUB_AUTH_ARGS[@]}" https://api.github.com/repos/get-gah/gah/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name')
	else
		tag=$(wget -q "${GITHUB_AUTH_ARGS[@]}" -O- https://api.github.com/repos/get-gah/gah/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name')
	fi
	print_green "OK, latest tag is $tag"
else
	print_green "Installing requested gah version $GAH_VERSION"
	tag=$GAH_VERSION
fi

# Download gah! script
print_blue "Downloading gah $tag script..."
if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
	curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/get-gah/gah/refs/tags/$tag/gah -o "$GAH_INSTALL_DIR/gah"
else
	wget -q https://raw.githubusercontent.com/get-gah/gah/refs/tags/$tag/gah -O "$GAH_INSTALL_DIR/gah"
fi
chmod +x "$GAH_INSTALL_DIR/gah"
print_green "OK"

print_green "Done!"
```
